channel.title: DoD News (sample)
channel.description: Sample defense.gov DoD News feed for offline scraper testing.

item.title: DoD awards contract for enterprise generative AI platform
item.description: The Department awarded a contract for a generative artificial intelligence platform for staff workflows.

item.title: Pentagon issues updated artificial intelligence adoption strategy directive
item.description: DoD released a directive establishing guidance and policy for responsible AI adoption across the services.

item.title: Secretary hosts foreign delegation for bilateral talks
item.description: Officials met with a visiting delegation to discuss shared security priorities.
